provenance: Hand-derived (TDD RED-phase) by chaining this packet's current, corrected as-implemented per-strategy formulas end-to-end -- computed BEFORE running the composed Rust code -- against the CORRECTED BeadingFactoryParams defaults (packet 111 Step 7 integration fix: optimal_width=4000, min_input_width=1000 (min_feature_size), min_output_width=4000 (min_bead_width), distribution_count=1 (wall_distribution_count), default_transition_length=4000 (wall_transition_length), transition_filter_dist=1000 (wall_transition_filter_deviation), minimum_variable_line_ratio=0.5 (upstream minimum_variable_line_width factory default), outer_wall_offset=300 (nonzero, so OuterWallInsetBeadingStrategy is present in the chain per the now-conditional wrap), max_bead_count=3). thickness=20000, bead_count=5 so bead_count exceeds max_bead_count=3, exercising Limited's over-cap branch as well. Scope-gap-closure addendum: print_thin_walls=true (so WideningBeadingStrategy stays present in the chain, matching this fixture's original derivation) and preferred_bead_width_outer=4000.0 (== optimal_width) were added to BeadingFactoryParams. Since max_bead_count=3 is NOT <= 2, effective_optimal_width resolves to optimal_width=4000 regardless of preferred_bead_width_outer's value, and RedistributeBeadingStrategy's optimal_width_outer parameter -- now sourced from preferred_bead_width_outer instead of optimal_width -- is numerically identical (4000) either way. RE-RECORDED 2026-07-13 after the D-105 architectural fix to `LimitedBeadingStrategy::compute` (now mirrors OrcaSlicer's `LimitedBeadingStrategy.cpp:64-90` — recomputes the parent at `optimal_thickness = max_bead_count * optimal_width = 12000`, carries the surplus `20000 - 12000 = 8000` as `left_over` for infill, then mirrors the result symmetrically about the region centre, then inserts zero-width sentinels). The old fixture's middle bead width of 12000 is now the middle bead width of (thickness - optimal_thickness) = 8000, and the right-mirror position shifts from 18000 to 17700 (outer-wall inset offset on the right side: 20000 - 2300 = 17700, NOT 20000 - 2000 = 18000 as the old fixture had it before the outer-wall inset correction was applied asymmetrically).
notes: Limited.compute(20000, 5) with max_bead_count=3: bead_count(5) > max_bead_count(3) => over-cap branch. optimal_thickness = parent.optimal_thickness(3) = 3 * optimal_width(4000) = 12000. parent.compute(12000, 3) is called (NOT 20000). Surplus 20000-12000=8000 added to left_over.

Redistribute.compute(12000, 3): thickness=12000, min_var_ratio=0.5, optimal_width_outer=4000. inner_bead_count_signed=3-2=1 (>0), inner_thickness=12000-2*4000=4000 (>0) => Distributed.compute(4000, 1): bead_count==1 special case => bead_widths=[4000], toolpath_locations=[2000]. Shift by +optimal_width_outer(4000): toolpath_locations=[6000]. actual_outer_thickness: bead_count(3)>2 => min(12000/2=6000, 4000)=4000. Insert front: bead_widths=[4000,4000], toolpath_locations=[2000,6000]. bead_count>1 => push back: bead_widths=[4000,4000,4000], toolpath_locations=[2000,6000,10000]. sum=12000 => left_over=0.
Widening.compute(12000, 3): thickness(12000) >= optimal_width(4000) => delegates to Redistribute's result unmodified.

OuterWallInset.compute(12000, 3) offset=300: parent (Widening) result = [4000,4000,4000]/[2000,6000,10000]. effective_bead_count=3 (all nonzero) >= 2 => proceed. toolpath_locations[0] = min(2000+300, 12000/2=6000) = 2300 (index 0 ONLY -- single-sided inset). Result: bead_widths=[4000,4000,4000], toolpath_locations=[2300,6000,10000], left_over=0.

Limited over-cap continuation: beading = [4000,4000,4000]/[2300,6000,10000] from parent.compute(12000,3). left_over += 20000-12000=8000 => left_over=8000. total_thickness=20000. n=3 (odd), so middle: toolpath_locations[1] = 20000/2 = 10000, bead_widths[1] = 20000-12000 = 8000. Mirror loop (i in 0..n.div_ceil(2)=2): i=0 => toolpath_locations[2] = 20000-2300 = 17700; i=1 => toolpath_locations[1] = 20000-10000 = 10000 (no change). Result before sentinels: bead_widths=[4000,8000,4000], toolpath_locations=[2300,10000,17700], left_over=8000, total_thickness=20000.

sentinel_count = bead_count(5) - max_bead_count(3) = 2. left_index = n/2 = 1, right_index = n-left_index = 3-1 = 2. left_location = toolpath_locations[left_index-1] + bead_widths[left_index-1]/2 = 2300 + 4000/2 = 4300 (innermost left bead's inner edge, per OrcaSlicer LimitedBeadingStrategy.cpp:118-122). right_location = toolpath_locations[right_index] - bead_widths[right_index]/2 = 17700 - 4000/2 = 15700 (innermost right bead's inner edge, per OrcaSlicer LimitedBeadingStrategy.cpp:126-130).
Insert 2 zero-width sentinels at index 1 (left block): bead_widths [4000,8000,4000] -> [4000,0,0,8000,4000]; toolpath_locations [2300,10000,17700] -> [2300,4300,4300,10000,17700].

shifted_right_index = right_index(2)+sentinel_count(2) = 4. Insert 2 zero-width sentinels at index 4 (right block): bead_widths [4000,0,0,8000,4000] -> [4000,0,0,8000,0,0,4000]; toolpath_locations [2300,4300,4300,10000,17700] -> [2300,4300,4300,10000,15700,15700,17700].

RAW result (with sentinels at the OrcaSlicer-faithful inner-edge positions, D-105C fix): bead_widths=[4000,0,0,8000,0,0,4000], toolpath_locations=[2300,4300,4300,10000,15700,15700,17700], left_over=8000, total_thickness=20000.

STRIPPED (compute_and_strip, drop zero-width beads in lockstep with their toolpath_locations entries): bead_widths=[4000,8000,4000], toolpath_locations=[2300,10000,17700], left_over=8000, total_thickness=20000. total_thickness and left_over pass through unchanged (removed sentinels contributed exactly 0.0 width).
